name: Owler

auth.notes: Legacy docs.owler.cloud show Basic Auth over HTTPS. Community Ballerina connector for Owler API v1.0 uses API key user_key against https://api.owler.com/. Current Owler Data Licensing/API access appears sales-gated.

rateLimits: Legacy docs.owler.cloud: most endpoints 100 requests/hour. No current public rate limits found for Owler Data Licensing/API.
pagination: Community Ballerina connector documents limit parameters for search and pagination_id for feeds; current official pagination contract is not public.
notes: Official data licensing page confirms an API sales path but does not publish endpoint, auth, rate-limit, or pagination reference.
docs.owler.cloud appears to document an older API surface with Basic Auth and social-style endpoints; do not assume it matches current licensed company-data API.
reviewReason: Current Owler Data Licensing/API endpoint reference, auth scheme, pagination, and rate limits are not publicly documented; public sources conflict between legacy Basic Auth docs and community API-key/OpenAPI-derived connector docs.
